task_completion.description: Content from FOMC_Minutes_Raw.txt is present in the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open containing the raw text from the FOMC minutes.

task_completion.description: The title 'Federal Reserve FOMC Briefing' is at the top, center-aligned, bold, and 18pt font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title text is visible at the top of the document. It appears bold, centered, and larger than the rest of the text. The toolbar should indicate 18pt font size, bold, and center alignment when the text is selected or being edited.

task_completion.description: Section headings 'Staff Economic Outlook' and 'Participants' Views on Current Conditions' are bold and 14pt font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specified headings appear bold and larger than the body text. The toolbar should indicate 14pt font size and bold when these headings are selected.
The body paragraphs have straight, even edges on both the left and right margins, or the 'Justify' alignment button is highlighted in the toolbar.

task_completion.description: Data from SEP_Projections.csv is appended as a table at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A formatted table containing the SEP projections data is visible at the bottom of the document.

task_completion.description: The document is saved as FOMC_Client_Briefing.docx in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor title bar shows 'FOMC_Client_Briefing.docx', or a 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved to ~/Documents/TextDocuments/ with the correct name.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processing application (like LibreOffice Writer) being used, rather than terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The CSV data was inserted as a proper table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data at the end of the document appears in a grid/table format with cells, rather than just pasted plain text with commas.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run scripts (e.g., python docx libraries or pandoc) that automatically generate the formatted .docx file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/FOMC_Client_Briefing.docx.
